subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-18 in London
subcodes.first_line: My hope is that you purify your hearts until they resemble this mirror, that they may reflect the light of the perfections and grace
subcodes.first_line_orig: امیدوارم مانند این آئینه قلوب را صاف و پاک و پاکیزه نمائید تا حکایت از انوار کمالات
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @being a source of light; guidance, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
